njust-ai.description: The best free models to get started

landing.introduction: Your intelligent Cangjie language development companion — powered by AI, built for the full Cangjie toolchain.
landing.featureToolchain: Integrated cjpm build, cjfmt format, cjlint check
landing.featureAi: AI-assisted coding, error fixing, and code review

providerSignup.heading: Configure your AI provider
providerSignup.chooseProviderLocal: Choose an AI provider to power the Cangjie assistant
providerSignup.useAnotherProviderDescription: Use your own API key or another provider

waitingForCloud.heading: Logging into NJUST_AI Cloud...
waitingForCloud.description: We'll take you to your browser to sign up. We'll then bring you back here to finish.
waitingForCloud.noPrompt: If you don't get prompted to open a URL, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.havingTrouble: If you've completed sign up but are having trouble, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.pasteUrl: Paste the callback URL shown in your browser:
waitingForCloud.invalidURL: That doesn't look like a valid callback URL. Please copy what is shown in your browser.

startRouter: We recommend using an LLM Router:
startCustom: Or you can bring your provider API key:

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: NJUST_AI collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. This telemetry does not collect code, prompts or personal information. You can turn this off in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
